# Stella UI

> A dark-first React design system with celestial design language. Two packages: `@stella-ds/react` v0.3.0 (components) and `@stella-ds/theme` v0.3.0 (CSS custom properties). Built on Radix UI primitives with full accessibility support. MIT license.

## Installation

```bash
pnpm add @stella-ds/react @stella-ds/theme
# or
npm install @stella-ds/react @stella-ds/theme
```

Import the theme CSS in your app entry point:

```tsx
import '@stella-ds/theme/css';   // injects --stella-* CSS custom properties into :root
import '@stella-ds/react/css';   // component styles
```

Or inject at runtime:

```tsx
import { injectCSSVars } from '@stella-ds/theme';
injectCSSVars();
```

Requires React ^18.0.0 or ^19.0.0.

## Components

### Typography
- **Heading** — Semantic h1-h6 with size, weight, alignment, and font family control
- **Text** — Polymorphic body text primitive (renders as p, span, div, or label)

### Inputs
- **Button** — Variants: solid, outline, ghost, glow. Sizes: sm, md, lg. Supports loading state and asChild.
- **Input** — Single-line text input with size and error state (boolean or string message)
- **Checkbox** — Accessible checkbox with optional label, built on Radix UI
- **Radio** (RadioGroup, RadioItem) — Radio button group with orientation control
- **Select** (Select, SelectTrigger, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectGroup, SelectLabel, SelectSeparator) — Dropdown select
- **Switch** — Toggle switch with label support

### Display
- **Avatar** — Round image with initials fallback. Sizes: xs, sm, md, lg, xl.
- **Badge** — Inline label for status/counts. Variants: solid, outline, subtle. Colors: default, primary, success, warning, error.

### Feedback
- **Alert** (Alert, AlertTitle, AlertDescription) — Inline feedback banner. Variants: info, success, warning, error.
- **Skeleton** — Loading placeholder with pulse animation. Variants: text, circular, rectangular.
- **Toast** (ToastProvider, ToastViewport, Toast, ToastTitle, ToastDescription, ToastClose, ToastAction) — Ephemeral notification

### Layout
- **Card** (Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, CardFooter) — Content container with optional hover lift
- **Stack** — Flexbox layout primitive for vertical/horizontal lists with gap tokens
- **Separator** — Visual divider (horizontal or vertical)
- **Section** — Semantic section wrapper with max-width and padding presets
- **PageGrid** — CSS grid layout with sidebar support
- **Background** — Animated visual backgrounds: starfield, galaxy, milky way, gradient, solid
- **Header** (Header, HeaderBrand, HeaderNav, HeaderActions) — Site header with sticky/blur/mobile nav
- **Footer** (Footer, FooterContent, FooterDivider, FooterBottom) — Site footer

### Navigation
- **Breadcrumb** (Breadcrumb, BreadcrumbList, BreadcrumbItem, BreadcrumbLink, BreadcrumbSeparator) — Breadcrumb navigation
- **Tabs** (Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger, TabsContent) — Tabbed content panels. Variants: line, solid.

### Overlay
- **Dialog** (Dialog, DialogTrigger, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogFooter, DialogTitle, DialogDescription, DialogClose) — Modal dialog
- **Tooltip** (TooltipProvider, Tooltip, TooltipTrigger, TooltipContent) — Hover tooltip

## Design Tokens

All CSS custom properties use the `--stella-` prefix.

### Colors

| Palette | Role | Key Token | Hex |
|---|---|---|---|
| cosmos | Primary / Interactive | `--stella-color-cosmos-500` | #5b5bf0 |
| nebula | Accent / Decorative | `--stella-color-nebula-500` | #a855f7 |
| aurora | Accent / Informational | `--stella-color-aurora-500` | #06b6d4 |
| nova | Success / Positive | `--stella-color-nova-500` | #10b981 |
| solar | Warmth / Attention | `--stella-color-solar-500` | #f59b07 |
| void | Backgrounds | `--stella-color-void-base` | #0a0c14 |
| starlight | Text / Foreground | `--stella-color-starlight-primary` | #f0f0f5 |
| error | Error states | `--stella-color-error-500` | #ef4444 |
| warning | Warning states | `--stella-color-warning-500` | #f59e0b |

### Void Surface Hierarchy (darkest to lightest)
- `--stella-color-void-base` (#0a0c14) — Page background
- `--stella-color-void-surface` (#12151e) — Card backgrounds, containers
- `--stella-color-void-overlay` (#1a1e2a) — Dropdowns, dialogs, popovers
- `--stella-color-void-muted` (#262c3a) — Hover backgrounds, table stripes

### Other Token Categories
- **Spacing:** `--stella-spacing-{0,1,2,3,4,6,8,12,16}` (4px base unit, e.g. spacing-4 = 1rem/16px)
- **Border Radius:** `--stella-borderRadius-{none,sm,base,md,lg,xl,2xl,full}`
- **Shadow:** `--stella-shadow-{sm,base,md,lg}`, `--stella-shadow-glow-cosmos`
- **Typography:** `--stella-typography-fontFamily-{sans,serif,display,statement,mono}`, `--stella-typography-fontSize-{xs,sm,base,lg,xl,2xl,3xl,4xl,5xl}`
- **Transition:** `--stella-transition-{fast,base,slow}` (100ms, 200ms, 350ms)

## Usage Rules

**Do:**
- Always use `--stella-*` CSS variables -- never hardcode colors, spacing, or shadows
- Use `cosmos` for all primary interactive elements (buttons, links, focus rings)
- Use `void-surface` for card backgrounds, `void-base` for page background, `void-overlay` for floating layers
- Left-align text by default; center only for hero headlines and short labels
- Use `:focus-visible` (never `:focus`) for keyboard focus styles
- List specific CSS properties in transitions: `transition: background-color 200ms ease-out`
- Ensure touch targets are at least 44x44px
- Define all six interactive states: rest, hover, focus, active, disabled, loading

**Don't:**
- Combine cosmos + nebula + aurora in a single component (the "AI color triangle" looks generated)
- Add glow shadows on non-interactive elements (glow = interaction energy only)
- Use `backdrop-filter: blur()` on content cards (reserved for navigation chrome and transient overlays only)
- Use `transition: all` -- always list specific properties
- Add glowing `text-shadow` on headings (strongest AI-generated signal)
- Use more than one `solid` button per visual group (use `outline` or `ghost` for secondary actions)
- Use `border-radius: full` on cards (reserved for avatars and pills only)
- Apply `translateY(-2px)` + shadow increase on hover (use border-color or background-color shift instead)
- Use gradient mesh or floating orbs in backgrounds

## Composition

Components that support polymorphic composition expose `asChild` via `@radix-ui/react-slot` where applicable. Components use `React.forwardRef` for DOM access. Variants and sizes follow: `variant="solid"`, `size="md"`.

## Links

- npm: [@stella-ds/react](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@stella-ds/react), [@stella-ds/theme](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@stella-ds/theme)
- Storybook: Available for live component examples (run `pnpm storybook` locally)
